form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished last over 450m at Maitland beaten 7 lengths (25.34) behind Badger's Beast in a Free For All on April 13. Better than the last couple of runs suggest. Expected to do much better.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Drifted wide in the home straight and came together.
